```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

# Chapter 3

>
> — *Chapter 3, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

>
> — *Chapter 5, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

> — *Chapter 7, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

> — *Chapter 9, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

>
> — *Chapter 11, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

>
> — *Chapter 13, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

>
> — *Chapter 15, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

>
> — *Chapter 17, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

>
> — *Chapter 19, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

>
> — *Chapter 21, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

>
> — *Chapter 23, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

>
> — *Chapter 25, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

> — *Chapter 27, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

>
> — *Chapter 29, Section 1*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```

> — *Chapter 30, Section 2*

```swift
struct Reader: View {
    let blocks: [MarkdownBlock]
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView {
            ForEach(blocks.indices, id: \.self) { i in
                BlockView(block: blocks[i])
            }
        }
    }
}
```
